form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run when 2nd (Fr2) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 5th-8.97 beaten 8 m by Jorge Street (2:01.50) in NR up to 90 on April 1 at $11. Expected to go well again.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr5) over 1730m after showing early speed at this track, at the bell was 2nd-2.28 beaten 18 m by Jorge Street (2:01.50) in NR up to 90 on April 1 at $8.50. At the run before was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr6) over 2260m at this track was 9th-26.9 at the bell, beaten 15 m by Ripp (2:42.50) in No NR on March 28 at $126. Draws for a strong showing.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; was well back in the run when 5th (Fr6) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 7th-13.24 beaten 14 m by Jorge Street (2:01.50) in NR up to 90 on April 1 at $26. Showed ability the outing before when he won by a head after showing early speed, (Fr5) at this track (2:03.90) beating Ultimate Cruza in 4yo+ NR up to 80 GH on March 25 at $4. Contender.

form.formComment: Well beaten last start by Jorge Street, who he meets again; was restrained, when 19 metres seventh at this track over 1730m in a NR up to 90 race on April 1. Can do better.
